assignments.focus: Message input visibility across viewports. Shows fixed-bottom input field on mobile portrait/landscape, tablet, and desktop. Input remains visible when scrolling message history. Demonstrates proper spacing and keyboard-safe positioning.

Full-page key setup for first-time OAuth users. Shows password + confirm fields, 'Save this password' warning at 3 points (before, during, after), password manager-friendly form structure. Distinguishes setup mode from unlock mode.

Undecryptable message handling and participant name resolution. Shows lock icon for encrypted messages user cannot decrypt, tooltip on hover/focus, explanatory text. Also shows 'Deleted User' and 'Unknown User' name states with visual indicators.
